---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg          # add a profile.jpg to the root folder later
about:
  template: jolla           # try: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:you@email.com
---

## Hi, I'm Your Name

I'm a data analyst based in South Africa. I use R and Python to explore and
visualise data — this site is where I share that work publicly.

## What You'll Find Here

- **Exploratory analysis** of South African economic and social data
- **Interactive visualisations** you can explore yourself
- **Reproducible code** — every post shows the code behind the charts

## Tools I Use

- **R** — ggplot2, tidyverse, sf (spatial data)
- **Python** — pandas, matplotlib, plotly
- **Quarto** — for publishing reproducible documents
- **GitHub** — version control and hosting
